message:
style: cargo fmt tidy in sqlite fts tests and cli_robot parser

Pure cargo fmt output rolled up from the session's formatter pass:

- src/storage/sqlite.rs: the writable_schema test had
    conn.execute_batch(...)
        .unwrap();
  reformatted onto a single line now that the argument fits. A sibling
  query_row_map call migrated from three-argument form to closure-
  trailing form for the same reason.

- tests/cli_robot.rs: parse_index_semantic_embedder_flags had
    let cli = Cli::try_parse_from(...).unwrap();
  spread across an extra wrap line. fmt collapsed it by chaining
  .unwrap() onto the trailing line. No logic change.
